name: Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can whole kernel corn, drained
2 oz cheddar OR swiss cheese, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl combine the drained corn, cheese cubes, green pepper, onion, cucumber, and pickle relish.
2. Fold in the salad dressing.
3. Cover; chill several hours or overnight.
4. Serve in lettuce cups.
